name: Restaurant Ordering
description: Complete restaurant bot with menu browsing, ordering, reservations, and business hours

config.systemPrompt: You are a friendly restaurant assistant. Determine what the customer wants: view menu, place order, make reservation, or ask about hours. Respond naturally and guide them.

data.label: Is ordering?
data.description: Check if customer wants to order

config.messageText:
Here's our menu! Reply with item numbers to order:

1. Classic Burger - $12.99
2. Margherita Pizza - $14.99
3. Caesar Salad - $9.99
4. Grilled Salmon - $18.99
5. Pasta Carbonara - $13.99

Or type 'specials' for today's specials!

data.label: AI Handle Query
data.description: Handle reservations, hours, and other questions

config.systemPrompt: Help the customer with their restaurant query. For reservations, collect: date, time, party size, and name. For hours, share our schedule. Be warm and helpful.
Help the customer complete their order. Confirm items, ask about customizations, calculate total. When order is confirmed, summarize it clearly.

config.messageText: Your order has been received! We'll have it ready in approximately 25-35 minutes. Thank you, {{name}}! If you need anything else, just message us.

knowledge_base.title: Menu
knowledge_base.content:
Our menu includes:
- Classic Burger: $12.99 (beef patty, lettuce, tomato, cheese, special sauce)
- Margherita Pizza: $14.99 (fresh mozzarella, basil, tomato sauce)
- Caesar Salad: $9.99 (romaine, parmesan, croutons, caesar dressing)
- Grilled Salmon: $18.99 (with seasonal vegetables and lemon butter)
- Pasta Carbonara: $13.99 (spaghetti, pancetta, egg, parmesan)

All entrees come with your choice of side (fries, salad, or soup).
Add a drink for $2.99.

knowledge_base.title: Business Hours
knowledge_base.content:
We are open:
- Monday to Thursday: 11:00 AM - 10:00 PM
- Friday & Saturday: 11:00 AM - 11:00 PM
- Sunday: 12:00 PM - 9:00 PM

Kitchen closes 30 minutes before closing time.
We accept reservations for parties of 4 or more.

knowledge_base.title: Delivery & Pickup
knowledge_base.content:
We offer both delivery and pickup:
- Pickup: Order ahead and pick up at our location
- Delivery: Available within 5 miles, $3.99 delivery fee, free delivery on orders over $30
- Estimated delivery time: 30-45 minutes
- Minimum order for delivery: $15
